negative_news_protocol.definition: Visa rejection spikes, student housing scandals, university closure, protest coverage, sector funding cuts

language_rules: Always include forward-looking 'what this means' paragraph
Frame as market signal, not verdict

off_limits_topics: Immigration as cultural controversy (only as a data point)
Individual student complaints or legal cases

competitor_rules.note: No competitor brands, products, or people to be named in any content
competitor_rules.note_sturents: StuRents is a competitor but can be cited as a data source

escalation.trigger: Topic is sensitive but editorially important
escalation.action: Flag in review doc with [SENSITIVE] tag — requires named reviewer approval before publish
escalation.escalation_contact: TODO: Add Slack handle / name of approver

data_sourcing: Always cite the source name and date of data
Never use data older than 12 months without flagging it as historical
Prefer official/government sources over news reports where both exist

tone_by_channel.blog: Longer, more data, structured with H2s, CTA at end
tone_by_channel.linkedin: Punchy, hook-led, 150-300 words, single clear takeaway
